pi_dependency.algorithm: Bister and Emanuel (2002) pcmin full-column potential intensity

physics.lgem_parameter_provenance: DeMaria (2009) Atlantic benchmark values used only while fitting and testing the calibration framework; an activated WNP artifact must carry its own n and beta.
references: Bister and Emanuel (2002), implemented by tcpyPI 1.4: full-column thermodynamic potential intensity.
DeMaria (2009): logistic-growth-equation intensity model; coefficients require basin-specific calibration.
Kaplan and DeMaria inland decay: V(t)=Vb+(R*V0-Vb)exp(-alpha*t), R=0.9.
NOAA CoastWatch/AOML: OHC is heat integrated above the 26 C isotherm.

geometry.provenance: Track positions are evaluated as a time-parametric spherical curve. Spatial chord-boundary intersections detect entries even when both temporal endpoints are over water.

identity_evidence: HKO GIS catalog matched BAVI; tcid=2614

source_quality.rule: Identity evidence and physical plausibility govern source eligibility. Position and intensity disagreement remain in the output as decision-relevant uncertainty.

official_guidance.definition: Each agency's native forecast wind at its own track-derived target-China landfall time. A separate 10-minute comparison appears only when a documented conversion exists.

spatial_sst_quality_control.rule: difference <= 2.0 C within 100 km and 2.0 h

mechanistic_scenarios.definition: Scenarios require full-column tcpyPI, calibrated WNP LGEM growth coefficients, shear, OHC diagnostics, and global-land Kaplan-DeMaria segments. Official future wind endpoints remain outside the tendency equation.

decision_view.interpretation: Preparedness uses named official branches and their documented 10-minute comparison range. The mechanistic range remains research-only until the WNP hindcast gate passes.
